final_decision.exact_quote: To dispute a charge, please contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number (only free when dialling from within the USA) located on the front or back of your Visa card. In many cases, your issuer or bank will require detailed information regarding the transaction before resolving the disputed charge.

In many cases, your issuer or bank will require detailed information regarding the transaction before resolving the disputed charge.

input.Issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
